original_query: SELECT "t6"."JOB", CAST("t6"."EXPR1" * "t7"."f1" AS INTEGER) FROM (SELECT "JOB", SUM("SAL") AS "EXPR1" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t6" INNER JOIN (SELECT "NAME", COUNT(*) AS "f1" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t7" ON "t6"."JOB" = "t7"."NAME"
rewritten_query: SELECT "t6"."JOB", CAST("t6"."EXPR1" * "t7"."f1" AS INTEGER) FROM (SELECT "JOB", SUM("SAL") AS "EXPR1" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t6" INNER JOIN (SELECT "NAME", COUNT(*) AS "f1" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t7" ON "t6"."JOB" = "t7"."NAME"
